message:
fix(mastodon): replace lossy u64-to-u32 casts with try_from

Replace 4 instances of 'v as u32' with u32::try_from(v).unwrap_or(u32::MAX)
when parsing limit values from JSON input. The bare cast silently
truncated values > u32::MAX; try_from saturates to u32::MAX instead,
which is a safe upper bound that the API will naturally clamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
